description: Use when: 'draw a diagram', 'scientific figure', 'visualize this', 'architecture diagram', 'plot this function'. Typst/CeTZ (fast, default), TikZ (math/circuits/chemistry), D2 (architecture/ERD), Asymptote (3D).
name: scientific-drawing

description: Create, design, and validate Agent Skills for Claude Code. Use when the user wants to create a new skill, improve an existing skill, or learn about skill authoring best practices. Helps with SKILL.md structure, frontmatter validation, progressive disclosure, and testing strategies.
name: skill-authoring

description: X (Twitter) API v2 pay-per-use client — paginated user-tweets pull, cost-tracked Bearer auth, server-side cashtag extraction. Use when monitoring a curated set of finance/research accounts for ticker mentions and material claims. Cost: $0.005/post-read, $0.010/user-read.
name: x-api
